data.title: Faraday Future invests $41 million in Qualigen Therapeutics for crypto business through PIPE transaction.
data.description: In a press release today, it was revealed that Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) and Qualigen Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: QLGN) have partnered up for a significant deal. The California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company and QLGN have officially signed a securities purchase agreement for a private investment in public equity (PIPE) within QLGN. This agreement includes an investment in QLGN’s common stock and preferred stock. Alongside this, the two companies will be launching a new venture in the realms of cryptocurrency and web3 technologies. The partnership, announced on September 19, 2025, will see an influx of capital and resources into QLGN as they diversify their business activities.

data.title: Guild Mortgage introduces Homebuyer Readiness Fairs to empower consumers with homeownership essentials, in partnership with CBC Mortgage Agency.
data.description: In San Diego, Guild Mortgage, a well-known retail mortgage lender, has introduced innovative Homebuyer Readiness Fairs as a key component of its Promise of Home campaign, aiming to empower consumers with housing solutions across the country. In partnership with CBC Mortgage Agency, a federally chartered Native American-owned housing finance agency, these fairs offer face-to-face assistance and specialized guidance to prospective homeowners, addressing challenges in the homebuying process.

data.title: National Healthcare Properties declared dividends for preferred stock: $0.4609375/share for Series A and $0.4453125/share for Series B. Payable on Oct 15, 2025.
data.description: Today, National Healthcare Properties, Inc. (Nasdaq: NHPAP / NHPBP) announced the declaration of quarterly dividends for its preferred stocks. The company declared a dividend of $0.4609375 per share on its 7.375% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, payable on October 15, 2025, to holders of record on October 3, 2025. Additionally, a dividend of $0.4453125 per share was declared on its 7.125% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, with the same payment and record date as the Series A dividend.

data.title: Helser Brothers unveiling Vervo Motorized Traverse French Pole at CWC 2025, offering elegance and automation.
data.description: The recently launched Vervo Motorized Traverse French Pole combines sophistication with contemporary automation, presenting designers with a unique combination. Revealed in CHANDLER, Ariz., on Sept. 19, 2025, by Helser Brothers, a leading custom drapery hardware producer, this innovative product aims to provide a seamless blend of style and functionality.

data.title: Perpetua Resources celebrates progress on Stibnite Gold Project with officials from Idaho, U.S. Army, Department of Defense, and Department of Agriculture. U.S. Forest Service Notice to Proceed received for imminent development.
data.description: The kick-off celebration for the Stibnite Gold Project in Idaho was attended by notable figures including the Governor, U.S. Army representatives, Department of Defense officials, and officials from the U.S. Department of Agriculture. The event followed the U.S. Forest Service's Notice to Proceed, allowing the project to commence development upon the fulfillment of financial requirements.

data.title: Winter Fest OC, SoCal's largest winter festival, returns Nov 28 to Jan 4 at OC Fair & Event Center featuring lights, snow, live entertainment, and festive fun.
data.description: The biggest winter festival in Southern California, Winter Fest OC, is set to make a comeback from November 28th to January 4th at the OC Fair & Event Center in Costa Mesa. The event is scheduled to run for approximately 38 days, offering visitors a winter wonderland experience in the heart of the region. Guests can expect a variety of festive activities and attractions suitable for all ages to enjoy.

data.title: Boston Teamsters at Local 25 win strike against Republic Services, ratify record contract as waste strike continues in Georgia on September 19, 2025.
data.description: Workers from Teamsters Local 25 have successfully ratified a new contract amidst a major strike against Republic Services in Georgia. The waste corporation, worth billions of dollars, faced a historic battle as the workers fought for their rights. The contract approval comes as a significant win for the workers, with key details of the agreement not explicitly revealed. This development marks a crucial milestone in the ongoing labor strike, highlighting the determination and unity of the workers in securing better terms.

data.title: Nikola Corp informs stockholders about derivative litigation in various actions. Important: Delaware Chancery, Federal, and Arizona Federal Derivative Actions.
data.description: A press release was issued on Sept. 19, 2025, in Phoenix, regarding derivative litigation involving Nikola Corporation. The litigation is occurring in the Delaware Chancery Action, the Delaware Federal Derivative Action, the Arizona Federal Derivative Action, and the Demand Made Derivative Action. Stockholders of Nikola Corporation are informed about these legal proceedings.

data.title: CEA Industries plans $250M stock buyback program, Nasdaq listed as BNC, aiming to boost shareholder value.
data.description: In New York on September 19, 2025, CEA Industries Inc. (Nasdaq: BNC), a key player in BNB holding and promotion, disclosed its plan to buy back $250 million worth of its common stock, as approved by the Board of Directors. This initiative underscores BNC’s commitment to enhancing shareholder value and confidence in the market.
